news.title: A CAR-T biotech’s dramatic turnaround, and drugmakers’ tactics to drive more scripts
news.summary: This week on "The Readout LOUD": a CAR-T biotech's dramatic turnaround, and drugmakers' tactics to drive more scripts. Listen now.

news.title: STAT+: Trump celebrates closing first round of drug pricing deals, promises more ahead
news.summary: A deal with Regeneron was the last of 17 initially sought by the White House.

news.title: Heart’s beat may help it beat cancer, mouse research suggests
news.summary: The constant pressure that the heart is under from beating thousands of times a day may create an environment hostile to cancers

news.title: STAT+: Trump’s boosting of psychedelics, cannabis signal a new era in GOP drug policy
news.summary: The Trump administration, in a stark departure from the "Just Say No" era, is funding psychedelics research and rescheduling marijuana.

news.title: STAT+: Legislatures in Colorado and Virginia resist moves to constrain drug affordability boards
news.summary: Legislators in two states are resisting efforts to restrict prescription drug affordability boards.

news.title: Opinion: Dropping the flu vaccine requirement puts U.S. military readiness at risk
news.summary: Since the 1918 pandemic, the military has acknowledged the threat of influenza. Now that’s changing.

news.title: STAT+: Sanofi research priorities in flux as new CEO logs in
news.summary: A gene therapy for deafness, all eyes on Erasca, and other biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: CMS, FDA team up to fast-track reimbursement for breakthrough devices
news.summary: Federal regulators are proposing a new, faster Medicare coverage pathway for medical devices deemed by the FDA as breakthroughs.

news.title: STAT+: RFK Jr. backs off some MAHA issues
news.summary: RFK Jr. is backing vaccinations and defending secret deals with pharma companies.

news.title: STAT+: AMA calls for regulatory crackdown on chatbots, wellness AI
news.summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: OpenAI's targets clinicians, AMA's call for regulatory crackdown, and bargain-basement telehealth visits.

news.title: Trump reclassifies state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug in a historic shift
news.summary: President Trump is reclassifying state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug, a major policy shift long sought by advocates.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about cheap telehealth visits, pharma withholding meds in Europe, and more
news.summary: Drugmakers have begun using coupons to discount the cost of telehealth visits with clinicians who can prescribe their drugs

news.title: Across 7 hearings, RFK Jr. talks a new, more moderate MAHA
news.summary: Discount telehealth visits, maternal mortality data, and more health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Can Erasca be biotech’s next big thing? We’ll see
news.summary: Can Erasca be biotech's next big thing?

news.title: Opinion: Kennedy’s new silence on vaccines is political — and it won’t last
news.summary: Kennedy’s public messaging on vaccines has shifted ahead of the midterms. It won’t last.

news.title: AI-powered prior authorizations for Medicare have greatly delayed care, Washington state hospitals say
news.summary: The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services' experimental WISeR Model has Medicare patients waiting two to four times longer for procedures, according to a Washington senator's report citing early data from 16 hospitals in her state.

news.title: Chutes & Ladders—Cityblock names former UHC exec as chief health officer; Blue Shield taps chief pharmacy officer
news.summary: Welcome to this week's Chutes & Ladders, our roundup of hirings, firings and retirings throughout the industry. Please submit the good news—or the bad—from your shop, and we will feature it here at the end of each week.

news.title: FTC files suit over telemarketing scheme selling fake PPO insurance
news.summary: The Federal Trade Commission has filed suit to intervene in a scheme in which it says fraudulent telemarketers targeted individuals seeking insurance coverage.

news.title: Molina strikes 'prudent' tone on 2026 outlook amid positive signs on Medicaid spending
news.summary: Molina Healthcare took the "prudent" route of reaffirming its 2026 outlook as questions loom in the Medicaid business.

news.title: FTC reaches tentative deal in anesthesiology 'roll-up scheme' litigation
news.summary: The regulator's 2023 complaint against USAP was rife with criticisms of its private equity backer. There was no mention of the firm in this week's announcement, which follows a separate 2025 deal and a new commission chair less opposed to such investors on a matter of principle.

news.title: CMS, FDA announce new program to speed up Medicare coverage of breakthrough medical devices
news.summary: The Trump administration unveiled a new program to speed up Medicare coverage for breakthrough devices, touting that the new pathway cuts red tape for medical device companies to gain reimbursement. CMS said it will pause the existing TCET pathway.

news.title: Telehealth provider Him & Hers adds all FDA-approved GLP-1s to platform
news.summary: Providers can now send prescriptions of Eli Lily’s Zepbound, Mounjaro and oral Foundayo, as well as Novo Nordisk’s Ozempic and Wegovy.

news.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free AI tool for physicians, NPs and pharmacists
news.summary: OpenAI unveiled on Wednesday ChatGPT for Clinicians, a version of ChatGPT designed to support clinical tasks like documentation and medical research.

news.title: Conservative think tank Paragon Health calls its shots on hospital policy reform
news.summary: A conservative policy shop with proven sway over the Trump administration released a new report undercutting the hospital industry's claims of widespread financial distress. An included 12-point wish list spanning site-neutral Medicare rates to more specific tax reporting builds on its recent victories over the hospital lobby.

news.title: Zocdoc partners with Yelp to allow real-time scheduling
news.summary: The capability is now available on Yelp’s iOS app on provider pages and through the platform’s new artificial intelligence chatbot, Yelp Assistant. It will expand to Android and desktop later this year, the announcement said.

news.title: Amazon One Medical launches GLP-1 program integrated with primary care
news.summary: Patients can take advantage of the GLP-1 management program through their One Medical primary care clinician. Medications are available for quick delivery to all 50 states, with nearly 3,000 cities having same-day delivery available.

news.title: RFK Jr. continues congressional hearing appearances to talk White House budget plan
news.summary: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. went in front of the Senate Committee on Health, Education, Labor and Pensions, his latest in a string of congressional hearings.

news.title: Regeneron ushers in new genetic medicine era with groundbreaking gene therapy approval
news.summary: Travis Smith was a very serious baby. Born completely unable to hear, his mother, Sierra, struggled to see his personality shine through his mute world.

news.title: Despite data concerns, Roche’s oral SERD can still be largest product in company history: exec
news.summary: While the scale of the currency headwinds in Roche’s first-quarter financial update caught many off guard, the company’s earnings call still featured much discussion on a pivotal pipeline prospect: the oral SERD drug giredestrant. The drug carries blockbuster ambitions, yet its commercial path has been clouded by imperfect clinical data.

news.title: Pfizer cans work on next-gen conjugate in cancer patients
news.summary: Pfizer has abandoned work on a PD-L1-targeting drug that was being tested in patients with various cancers.

news.title: Kurma closes €215M Europe-focused fund to spread across 20 biotechs
news.summary: Kurma Partners has closed its fourth biotech venture capital fund after raising 215 million euros ($252 million) to support European startups.

news.title: From debt to ‘acceptable’ prices: Roche CEO lists 3 reasons for sitting out Big Pharma M&A spree
news.summary: While Big Pharmas embarked on a frenzy of acquisitions over recent weeks, Roche’s CEO has explained to Fierce why the Swiss drugmaker is happy to sit this round out.

news.title: Sanofi CFO defends Hudson’s Dupixent legacy, but accepts ‘number of setbacks’ in R&D
news.summary: As Sanofi counts down the days before its new leader arrives, the pharma's CFO acknowledged to Fierce that there have been a “certain number of setbacks.”

news.title: Lilly reneges on remainder of Rigel deal in another blow for RIPK1 inhibitors
news.summary: Just a few months after ripping up the central nervous system-focused portion of its RIPK1 deal with Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Eli Lilly has now thrown out the rest of the pact, too.

news.title: Merck goes with Google for AI push, striking enterprise partnership worth up to $1B
news.summary: Amid industry layoffs and M&A headlines, Big Pharma's embrace of AI is gaining more steam.

news.title: AACR: NCI leader Letai battles ‘misinformation’ to assure anxious researchers that ‘funding is strong’
news.summary: NCI Director Letai envisions a return to normalcy for cancer research funding after last year's turmoil.

news.title: AcuityMD raises $80M to help bolster AI in the medtech industry
news.summary: AcuityMD has raised $80 million—with a company valuation now nearing $1 billion—to use its artificial intelligence (AI) platform to boost multiple aspects of how medtech companies operate.

news.title: Johnson & Johnson teams up with Viz.ai on hematoma detection
news.summary: Johnson & Johnson is working with artificial intelligence (AI) disease detection and care coordination platform Viz.ai to boost its neurovascular offerings.

news.title: McKesson swaps minority stake in surgical unit to Apollo Funds for $1.25B
news.summary: McKesson has let go of a minority share of its medical/surgical solutions division for $1.25 billion to Apollo Funds as part of the healthcare service giant’s plan to take the unit public next year.

news.title: 流量 2.0 时代
news.summary: 积极拥抱互联网转型吧，以新的方式焕发互联网新的价值。

news.title: 全球首发，中国脑机接口，怎么就突然超过美国了？
news.summary: 中国脑机接口全球首证，医疗落地领先。

papers.title: Test-Time Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models: A Systematic Study under Real-World Distribution Shifts
papers.summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models have shown strong potential for learning generalizable representations from large-scale neural data, yet their clinical deployment is hindered by distribution shifts across clinical settings, devices, and populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) offers a promising solution by enabling models to adapt to unlabeled target data during inference without access to source data, a valuable property in healthcare settings constrained by privacy regulations and limited labeled data. However, its effectiveness for EEG remains largely underexplored. In this w

papers.title: Streaming Structured Inference with Flash-SemiCRF
papers.summary: Semi-Markov Conditional Random Fields (semi-CRFs) assign labels to segments of a sequence rather than to individual positions, enabling exact inference over segment-level features and principled uncertainty estimates at their boundaries. However, existing implementations must materialize a large edge potential tensor whose size grows with sequence length, maximum segment length, and label count, becoming prohibitive for speech-scale state spaces and intractable at genomic scales where sequences can exceed 100,000 positions. This memory bottleneck has limited the adoption of exact segment-level
